subcodes.first_line: O servant! Hearken unto that which the Herald of Sinai imparteth unto thee from within the Temple of this Manifestation, that thou mayest be gladdened by the melodies of thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد اسمع ما یلقیک منادی الطور فی هیکل هذا الظهور لتستلذ عن نغمات ربک
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual transformation
